creator: yarodin@gmail.com
text:
Hmm... I tested unrar-iconv freshest  port and patch-iconv applied cleanly.
I haven't any idea why Sergei Golyashov got 'out of hunk' on this patch.
May be his ports tree is out dated or corrupted?

# cd /usr/ports/archivers/unrar-iconv
# make patch
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Extracting for unrar-iconv-3.80.b2,5
=> MD5 Checksum OK for unrarsrc-3.8.2.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for unrarsrc-3.8.2.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for unrar-iconv-3.80.b2,5
